characters.name: "Nana"
characters.description: "Nana"Full NameUnknownGenderFemaleAge60sEnemiesDr. DrakkenFamilyMr. Possible (son-in-law)Ann Possible(daughter)Kim Possible(granddaughter)Jim & Tim Possible (grandsons) "Nana"isAnn Possible's mother. Nana is a vibrant and active redhead with her own dojo. She joins Kim and Ann on the mission to rescueAthena.

characters.name: Professor Acari
characters.description: Professor Acariis anentemologistand a repeat client ofTeam Possible. He appears to spend much of his time inventing, because by his own admission, he has a great deal of free time.[1] Professor Acari was very devoted to his work. He allowed his numerous insects to roam freely about his lab, which could easily prove overwhelming for the unprepared or entomophobic. He was also well-mannered but slightly absent-minded, in that he easily lost track of his inventions[1][2], although this might have been a consequence of his consistently insect-covered workspace. Professor Acari was a talented entomologist, and as a result was very knowledgeable on various insects. Judging by his inventions, he also had experience in robotics as well.[3] Professor Acari was very devoted to his work. He allowed his numerous insects to roam freely about his lab, which could easily prove overwhelming for the unprepared or entomophobic. He was also well-mannered but slightly absent-minded, in that he easily lost track of his inventions[1][2], although this might have been a consequence of his consistently insect-covered workspace.

characters.name: Akut
characters.description: AkutegaveKim Possible,Ron Stoppable, andRufusa ride to an undisclosed location in northern North America (likely Alaska) to investigate a sighting of Dr. Drakken. They end up finding Dr. Drakken and Shego, along with henchmen, stealing a laser drill operating next to an oil pipeline. The ride was a favor for Kim saving Akute's life from a "small iceberg" (according to Kim)[1]. Akute appears to be a proficient musher, being able to keep from upsetting the sled after Shego forced the dogs to cause the sled to enter a spin[1]. Akut's dog sled and four dog team carrying Team Possible.

characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: Ameliais aMiddleton High Schoolstudent. She was a Senior during Kim's Sophomore year, yet was still at the school during what would have been Kim's Junior year. Amelia is a tall, slender, and curvaceous girl with long, wavy brown hair and dark green eyes. Amelia is shown to be shallow and snobbish.
characters.personality_section: Amelia is shown to be shallow and snobbish.

characters.name: Ann Possible/LAM
characters.description: Ann PossibleFull NameAnn PossibleGenderFemaleAge40sEnemiesDr. DrakkenFamilyMr. Possible (husband)"Nana"(mother)Kim Possible(daughter)Jim & Tim Possible (sons) Ann PossibleisKim Possible's mother and the daughter of"Nana". She has a doctorate as a brain surgeon. She is also a black belt.

characters.name: Athena
characters.description: AthenaGenderGenderless (Feminine Appearance)AgeUnknown (Adolescent Appearance)FriendsKim PossibleRon StoppableEnemiesKim Possible (temporarily)Ron Stoppable (temporarily)TalentsBo-StaffFamilyDr. Drakken (creator) Athenais aMiddleton High Schoolfreshman who is a new girl at school. She becameKim PossibleandRon Stoppable's best friend. They found her sitting against a wall crying. According to herself, she was having a rough day. Kim then decided to help Athena, and invited her to go with herself and Ron to Bueno Nacho. She was eventually revealed to be a cybertronic humanoid (android) created byDr. Drakken. At first, she is portrayed as a friendly and knowledgeable girl who appreciates Kim. She tries to stay focused on a mission and even attempts to be helpful but is shown to be clumsy. When Kim saw her again after being captured, however it turned out to be a façade. Athena was actually a villainous robot who trusted Drakken and Shego. Plus, she faked her friendship with Kim. Fortunately though, she was thankful that Kim saved her from being physically destroyed by Drakken's device and when the Possible family repaired and programmed her to be a hero, resulting in her turning into her good self.

characters.name: Aviarius
characters.description: Aviarius, "the Dark Master of the Winged World," is a bird-themed enemy ofTeam Gowith an extensive collection of bird minions and bird-motif gadgets. His secret lair, "the Nest," lies upon the peak of Go Mountain, just outside ofGo City. Aviarius was fueled entirely by his two main obsessions: birds and a desire for power. He himself stated that he wanted the powers of Team Go so that he could rule Go City, take over the world, and get revenge, though against who was never specified. As Aviarius worked alone, he likely designed his gadgets himself. If nothing else, he appeared to be a fairly skilled bird trainer. Also, though he did not initially appear to be skilled in hand to hand combat, once in possession of Team Go's powers, he wielded them with notable ease and was able to overwhelm both Team Go andTeam Possible. Aviarius was fueled entirely by his two main obsessions: birds and a desire for power. He himself stated that he wanted the powers of Team Go so that he could rule Go City, take over the world, and get revenge, though against who was never specified.

characters.name: Constable Barkin
characters.description: Constable Barkinis the past Police Chief ofMiddleton. He wasJon Stoppable's boss and had his own theory, which proved thatMim Possiblewas guilty of stealing an invention. It is unclear in the episodeRewriting Historyexactly when the dream sequence began, thus it is possible that Constable Barkin only ever existed inKimandRon's dream. However, given that Jon Stoppable later appeared on a float it is likely that he did exist. Like his grandson, he appears to be very strict and no-nonsense.
characters.personality_section: Like his grandson, he appears to be very strict and no-nonsense.

characters.name: Franklin Barkin
characters.description: Franklin Barkinis the mayor ofPort Mystic Cove Haven. He appears very similar to his son Steve Barkin, who are both tall and muscular. Franklin has long grey hair and brown eyes. Like his son, he appears to be very strict and no-nonsense. However, he briefly showed a lighter side using Ron's catchphrase in a moment of excitement before becoming embarrassed by his outburst. Like his son, he appears to be very strict and no-nonsense. However, he briefly showed a lighter side using Ron's catchphrase in a moment of excitement before becoming embarrassed by his outburst.

characters.name: Steven Barkin
characters.description: Steven "Steve" Barkinis the coach, disciplinarian, and a substitute teacher atMiddleton High School, which is attended byKim PossibleandRon Stoppable. For reasons of frequent injuries, sickness, or vacation among other staff members, Barkin teaches a variety of classes, ranging from gym to home economics. Barkin is tall with a large muscular build. He has dark eyes and dark hair cut into a neat flattop. Barkin's beard is lighter in color than his hair and grows at an abnormal rate, he has to shave 15 times a day to keep clean-shaven. If he doesn't, he grows a dense stub in only 19 minutes and a thick beard within hours.[1] Fashion police mugshot inFashion Victim. Barkin's manner is a gruff, no-nonsense, quick to anger, and contains little to no sense of humor. He is typically abrupt and abrasive with students, and is a stickler for punctuality and proper decorum. Barkin tends to be skeptical of things that he does not understand, especially when the explanation goes over his head. For example, while grading science experiments, he commended two students for building the classic volcano out of vinegar and baking soda, but cast extreme doubt on a device capable of tearing a hole in the space-time continuum. He ended up activating the device and unwittingly releasing a genetically engineered"Dino-thing"that had been trapped in the rift earlier. Barkin's personality has brought him into conflict with Kim on a number of occasions, primarily when he believed her missions or social life were encroaching on her school work, or that she had not been paying attention. He has also been particularly harsh with Ron, whose laid back personality conflicts with his own, and has been known to single Ron out when dealing out punishment or trying to make a point. Despite this, Barkin tries to take a "tough, but fair" approach. He refuses to play favorites in his classes, and will give "credit where credit is due" regardless of what he thinks of the student at other times. Additionally, while Barkin typically likes to be in charge, he has also been known to defer to others quickly, and without argument, when he recognizes that their experience outstrips his own, including Kim when villains encroach upon school and class time. He has been known to have a more gentle side that includes an appreciation of baked goods, a deep enthusiasm for selling housewares, and serving as a den mother, or "Brigadier Pixie", for a troop of Pixie Scouts in Middleton, although he ran the troop more like it was a division of theUnited States Army Rangers. He also sleeps with a teddy bear named Mr. Fuzzy. He is revealed to have served in an unspecified war or "police action" where he achieved the rank of Lieutenant. Which explains his conducting himself more like a drill sergeant than a teacher. His military service would also explain his strict no-nonsense attitude. He tends to panic in a major crisis, which indicates that he may suffer fromPost Traumatic Stress Disorder, aka shell shock

characters.name: Dr. Beaufox
characters.description: Dr. Beaufoxis an unlicensed cosmetic surgeon. Dr. Beaufoxoffered a radical experimental process involving nano-morph technology[1]. Who developed and where he obtained the process from is unknown. Dr. Beaufox performed an experimental surgery onCamille Leon, presumably with the last of her inheritance money she had access to prior to being cut off. It allows her to shapeshift into anyone. Presumably she may be able to shapeshift into nonexistent people as well, but so far has only nano-morphed into known individuals while committing crimes.

characters.name: Bebe
characters.description: TheBeberobots areDr. Drakken's attempt to create the perfect woman, initially for dates. However, because of his noted ineptitude at programming artificial intelligence, the Bebes began to think for themselves and deemed his leadership inadequate. They proceeded to devote their considerable skills toward their own goals, and very little was able to stand in their way. Bebe has long waist-length blonde hair in a dark grey headband. She wears a very-revealing, two-piece black minidress. She also has a beauty mark and hourglass figure, red glowing eyes and dark red upper lips. Bebe was created and programmed with one primary goal in mind: to be perfect. Though originally loyal only to Dr. Drakken, the Bebes eventually determined that he was unfit to command them (and did not truly care about them), so they began to act on their own. Bebe was created and programmed with one primary goal in mind: to be perfect. Though originally loyal only to Dr. Drakken, the Bebes eventually determined that he was unfit to command them (and did not truly care about them), so they began to act on their own. Bebe was largely emotionless, though Drakken admitted to programming them with a "pinch of human emotion" just so they would be ashamed when they did manage to fail him. Given Drakken's dismal track record with robot programming, that validity of that was questionable. However, the Bebes did seem to think that they required a human to guide them to perfection. During the second encounter with them, the Bebes decided to take over the world. They stole equipment that would allow them to produce more of themselves with the goal to build an army of Bebes. However, their arrogance would ultimately cause their downfall.

characters.name: Bob Chen
characters.description: ProfessorBob Chenmost likely attended university at theMiddleton Institute of Science and Technologiesalong withJames Possible,Drew LipskyandRamesh. He went on to become an astronomer at theMount Middleton Observatory[1]. Bob Chen is of Far-Eastern descent. He is of slender build, has prominent cheekbones, dark eyes and styles his black hair with a side parting. Typically he wears large, round glasses and a lab-coat and tie. Bob comes across as quite lighthearted. He enjoys teasing Dr. Possible and comments playfully on Dr. Drakken's inability to build a proper robot[1]. Bob comes across as quite lighthearted. He enjoys teasing Dr. Possible and comments playfully on Dr. Drakken's inability to build a proper robot[1].

He went on to become an astronomer at theMount Middleton Observatory[1]. Bob Chen is of Far-Eastern descent. He is of slender build, has prominent cheekbones, dark eyes and styles his black hair with a side parting. Typically he wears large, round glasses and a lab-coat and tie. Bob comes across as quite lighthearted. He enjoys teasing Dr. Possible and comments playfully on Dr. Drakken's inability to build a proper robot[1]. Bob comes across as quite lighthearted. He enjoys teasing Dr. Possible and comments playfully on Dr. Drakken's inability to build a proper robot[1].
characters.personality_section: Bob comes across as quite lighthearted. He enjoys teasing Dr. Possible and comments playfully on Dr. Drakken's inability to build a proper robot[1].

characters.name: Bobo
characters.description: Bobo the Chimpanzeewas the animal mascot forCamp Wannaweep, a run-downsummer camplocated in a forest region somewhere outside of Middleton. Several years prior toKimandRon's sophomore year Bobo shared cabin 13 with a young Ron Stoppable for a summer at Camp Wannaweep. During this time he ran rampage through the cabin, destroying its furnishings and menacing Ron to the extent that Ron developed a pathological fear of Monkeys for years afterwards. Bobo is presumed to have left Wannaweep after it closed down, as he is not present during the events of either of Ron's returns to Camp Wannaweep[1][2].

characters.name: Bonnie Rockwaller/LAM
characters.description: Bonnie RockwallerFull NameBonnie RockwallerGenderFemaleAge14FriendsAthena(seemingly)Kim Possible(frenemy)EnemiesKim Possible (arch-rival) Bonnie RockwallerisKim Possible's scholastic social arch-rival atMiddleton High School. As a Sophomore, she has been at MHS a year before Kim. She is the girl's soccer team captain.

characters.name: Britina
characters.description: Britinais a highly marketable popstar who has music albums & CDs, her own magazine, and a full-demanded doll line.Team Possiblehas assisted her a few times. Despite being a famous singer, Britina was still very down to earth and appears to have a good morality. She admittedly missed out on typical teen experiences, such as school dances, and this may be part of why she was such good friends withKim Possible, who in turn did not mind sharing details of her own high school troubles.[1]. Britina is an apparently talented singer and/or performer. Despite being a famous singer, Britina was still very down to earth and appears to have a good morality. She admittedly missed out on typical teen experiences, such as school dances, and this may be part of why she was such good friends withKim Possible, who in turn did not mind sharing details of her own high school troubles.[1].

characters.name: "Big Daddy" Brotherson
characters.description: "Big Daddy" Brothersonis a well-connected figure in the criminal underworld.[1]He typically has detailed knowledge of any major criminal activity or potential targets, and sells this information to make a profit.[2] Though he can be very serious, "Big Daddy" Brotherson is best known for his childish side, which delights in playing silly games and basically teasing his clients until he is finally ready to make a deal. Anyone who refuses to play along is swiftly and roughly dismissed by his bodyguard, as Dr. Drakken found out.[1][2] "Big Daddy" Brotherson first encounteredTeam Possibleat the black market, where they were searching for a lead in Professor Sylvan Green's kidnapping. Global Justice agent Will Du tried to force the information out of Brotherson and was immediately tossed through a window.Kim Possiblewas able to persuade Brotherson to give up the information with a chocolate bar.[1] Though he can be very serious, "Big Daddy" Brotherson is best known for his childish side, which delights in playing silly games and basically teasing his clients until he is finally ready to make a deal. Anyone who refuses to play along is swiftly and roughly dismissed by his bodyguard, as Dr. Drakken found out.[1][2]

characters.name: Cafeteria Lady
characters.description: The Cafeteria Lady,also known as theLunch Lady, isthe elderly woman who works at the cafeteria ofMiddleton High School. Tall and slim with a long pointed face, laugh-lines and bags beneath her eyes. She wears a lilac dress, apron, a hairnet over her grey bun and spectacles[1]. On the whole the lunch-lady seems to be a woman who takes no nonsense and strives to simply get her job done. She doesn't give any preferential treatment to the students she serves - Ron in particular seems to be an object of great apathy[2][3]. On the whole the lunch-lady seems to be a woman who takes no nonsense and strives to simply get her job done. characters.name: Chino
characters.description: Chinomade his first appearance in the episode "Fashion Victim" and was voiced byCharlie Schlatter. A trio of fashion-obsessed crooks,Chino, the male,Espadrile, the one without the hoodie, andHoodie, the one with the hoodie, which collectively comprise theFashionistas. They operate an organization dubbed "The Fashion Underground" based in Milan, Italy, in which they obtain various new fashion designs, make cheap imitations of them, and sell the counterfeits around the world, thus throwing the fashion world into chaos. In chronological order, their first appearance is in "Fashion Victim", where they hire fellow fashion loverCamille Leonto steal Club Banana's newest designs. Camille, however, also takes the opportunity to get her personal revenge on Kim in the process, which turns out to be their undoing when Kim turns the tables by posing as Camille and infiltrating their organization.

characters.name: Chippy
characters.description: Chippywas the monkey ninja which Ron thought was Kim turned into a monkey. Chippy is a small monkey. She has brown fur, tin skin, small beady eyes and in has the general appearance of a generic monkey. Despite being a trained monkey ninja, Chippy displays a certain lack of discipline in that she takes part in excessive snacking during missions, occasionally ignores Monkey Fist's orders, and is fairly curious about things unfamiliar to her.  Clearly she has a playful and mischievous streak. Despite being a trained monkey ninja, Chippy displays a certain lack of discipline in that she takes part in excessive snacking during missions, occasionally ignores Monkey Fist's orders, and is fairly curious about things unfamiliar to her.  Clearly she has a playful and mischievous streak. She could also be extremely aggressive around strangers. However, after spending a day with Ron, she relaxed considerably and was much more friendly. Chippy is loyal to and fiercely protective of Ron, even going so far as to attack her former master in order to defend Ron.

characters.name: Coco Banana
characters.description: Coco Bananais the main fashion designer forClub Banana. Mr. Banana is a short man with a black mustache and goatee and black slicked back hair as well as a beauty spot on his right cheek. He speaks with a slight accent and wears a stylish purple suit[1]. Coco Banana is both stylish and flamboyant. He takes his work very seriously, and judging by how fast he can come up with new designs[1]he must be a very talented and experienced designer. characters.name: Crystal
characters.description: Crystalis one of severalcheerleadersat Middleton High School. She is most often seen with the other cheerleaders.  Crystal is a cheerleader with dark reddish-brown wavy hair and green eyes. She is of average height and slender in body build. Out of uniform she is seen with a purple collared sweatshirt and light brown khaki pants. Cyrstal is fairly easy going individual, though when annoyed or provoked she possess a temper.

characters.name: Professor Dementor
characters.description: Professor Dementoris a supervillain and mad scientist who seeks to dominate the world. He is a competitor of Dr. Drakken's, as they are similar in villainy style. However, Dementor seems to be more infamous, and notably better equipped, staffed, and financed, making him more successful on a regular basis. Professor Dementor is short and stocky, yet muscular, with black eyes. Due to his never having been seen without his ever-present helmeted mask, the color of the hair atop his head is unknown. However, the color of his stylish chin-strap beard suggests if he is not bald, it may be brown. Dementor had something of a Napoleon complex, and was quick to anger. He generally followed a pattern of gloating, followed by exasperation, with a course of maniacal ranting to follow. He had an over-the-top German accent. Dementor had something of a Napoleon complex, and was quick to anger. He generally followed a pattern of gloating, followed by exasperation, with a course of maniacal ranting to follow. He had an over-the-top German accent.
